scripts.dev:up: docker compose --env-file .env.example -p financy-dev -f docker-compose.yml up -d --build && node -e "console.log()" && echo Development environments: && echo Frontend: http://localhost:5173 && echo Backend GraphQL: http://localhost:4000/graphql && echo Mailpit: http://localhost:8025 && echo MinIO Console: http://localhost:9001
scripts.test:backend:docker: pnpm dev:up && docker compose --env-file .env.example -p financy-dev -f docker-compose.yml exec backend pnpm --filter @financy/backend test
scripts.test:frontend: node scripts/e2e-runner.mjs test:e2e:smoke && node scripts/e2e-runner.mjs test:e2e:contract && node scripts/e2e-bootstrap.mjs && node scripts/e2e-runner.mjs test:e2e:journey
scripts.test:frontend:docker: docker compose --env-file .env.example -p financy-dev -f docker-compose.yml --profile e2e run --rm e2e sh -lc "pnpm e2e:smoke && pnpm e2e:contract && pnpm e2e:journey"
scripts.test:frontend:demo-video:docker: docker compose --env-file .env.example -p financy-dev -f docker-compose.yml --profile e2e run --rm e2e sh -lc "E2E_DEMO_VIDEO=true pnpm --filter @financy/frontend test:e2e:demo-video && node scripts/e2e-demo-video-postprocess.mjs"
scripts.verify: pnpm lint && pnpm dev:check && pnpm build:backend && pnpm build:frontend && pnpm test:backend && pnpm test:frontend
scripts.verify:docker: pnpm dev:up && pnpm test:backend:docker && pnpm test:frontend:docker
